title: Findrek's 3D Buckets and Fish
description: All bucket and fish items become 3D. Includes Optifine features, like variants of axolotls and tropical fish.
body:
# Buckets and Fish items become 3D ![In-game screenshot featuring the butcket items but in 3D, placed on item frames, in 2 rows. The first row shows, from left to right, an empty bucket, water bucket, lava bucket, milk bucket, and powdered snow bucket. The second row shows the mob buckets, looking like their living entity counterpart, from left to right, a bucket of cod, bucket of salmon, bucket of pufferfish, bucket of tropical fish (clowfish variation) and a bucket of axolotl (pink variation).](https://i.imgur.com/E2ONXem.png) ![Screenshot featuring the same buckets as the previous image, but displayed in the GUI.](https://i.imgur.com/fogGBRG.png) ![GUI screenshot of the fish food items, but in 3D, showing as their equivalent living mob version. Shown left to right, a cod, salmon, pufferfish, cooked cod, cooked salmon, and tropical fish. The cooked cod features the cooked fish texture as present in vanilla minecraft, and the cooked salmon has an orange tint.](https://i.imgur.com/Gol2Anh.png) ![GUI screenshot of a tadpole in a bucket, but in 3D. The tadpole model is the same as its living entity counterpart, and the bucket water is greener , like the original item.](https://i.imgur.com/dlxQLmI.png) This pack is **compatible with other texture packs**, and their respective textures will be displayed on the models included. ### Adaptable textures as of 26.2: - Water - Lava - Snow - Cod - Salmon - Pufferfish - Axolotl (all variants an babies) - Tadpole - Tropical fish (all variants) - Sulfur cube Buckets can also be placed in item frames on the ground as decoration, and fish placed as wall mounted fish

## CIT features: This pack does **NOT require Optifine** to work, but it also adds the following **custom item features if [Optifine is enabled](https://optifine.net/downloads)** on 1.21.4 or lower, and included by default on vanilla 1.21.5 and higher: Catching an **axolotl** in a bucket will display its **variant color** and **age** (as well as whether it's **low on health** on Optifine <1.21.4)

Catching a **tropical fish** in a bucket will display its **variant color** ![GUI screenshot of all 22 tropical fish variants in 3D buckets.](https://i.imgur.com/A0zEB2e.png) The lava in buckets of **lava glows** (Optifine exclusive)

_(Not compatible with other emissive Optifine packs, if you prefer the other packs to glow instead, place this one below them in the list)_ ### Renaming Items: Renaming a tropical fish item to one of the common fish names will give you its respective variant

[All fish variant names can be found here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tropical_Fish#Varieties) ![A chart with all 22 tropical fish variations with their respective names. Their names are the following: Clownfish, Tomato Clownfish, Goatfish, Cotton Candy Betta, Parrotfish, Yellowtail Parrotfish, Triggerfish, Cichlid, Queen Angelfish, Red Lipped Blenny, Dottyback, Anemone, Moorish Idol, Butterflyfish, Ornate Butterflyfish, Empreror Red Snapper, Red Snapper, Red Cichlid, Blue Tang, Black Tang, Yellow Tang, and Threadfin. The Clownfish is marked as (default) underneath its name.](https://64.media.tumblr.com/b9e476c7ce6e8440272d1fbc49ec41bf/fd04f8360c95e66d-19/s540x810/2ebc9a0830be7d113a4594bfb357faaf46168171.png) _(__**Please do not repost the zip file to other websites**__, linking back is appreciated)_
